home.someoneRecommended: Someone recommended a song for you
home.recommendToStranger: Recommend a song to a stranger

journey.radarEarlyHint: Based on your onboarding. Explore more cards to refine your taste map!

profile.disconnectSpotifyConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Spotify account? Your taste vector will be recalculated based on onboarding data only.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

onboarding.connectSpotifySubtitle: Connect Spotify to use your own music for taste profiling, or continue without it.
onboarding.connectSpotifyDescription: After connecting Spotify, we'll use your listening history to understand your taste
onboarding.tasteClear: Looks like your taste is clear. Ready to start discovering?
onboarding.swipeInstructions:
← swipe left: not for me
↑ swipe up: okay
→ swipe right: love it
onboarding.couldNotLoadTracks: Could not load {{source}} tracks. Using default selection.
onboarding.spotifyAuthFailed: Could not connect to Spotify. You can try again later or continue without it.

recommend.youJustHeard: You just heard "{{title}}" — recommend an equally amazing song
recommend.recommendToStranger: Recommend a song you like to a stranger
recommend.whyWorthListening: Compared to {{artist}}, why is this song worth listening to?
recommend.tellThemWhy: Tell them in one sentence why they should listen
recommend.strangerWillReceive: A stranger will receive your recommendation
recommend.noResults: No results found. Try different keywords.
recommend.openCardsFirst: Open your daily cards and give feedback — then you can re-recommend your favorites!

twins.findSimilarAndComplementary: Find people whose taste is most similar and complementary to yours
twins.moreUsersMessage: When more people join Taste Roulette, we'll match you with taste twins and complementary partners!
twins.mostSimilarTaste: Users with the most similar taste
twins.distantButSurprising: Different taste, not repulsive — the most surprising matches

spotifyConnect.connectSubtitle: Connect your Spotify account so we can better understand your taste
spotifyConnect.trackPreferences: Track changes in your listening preferences
spotifyConnect.privacyNote: We only read your listening history. We never modify your Spotify account.

feedback.surprisedDesc: Genuinely delighted — didn't expect to enjoy this!
feedback.okayDesc: Not my usual, but I can appreciate it
feedback.notForMeDesc: Too far from my comfort zone right now
feedback.howDoYouFeel: What do you think of this song?
feedback.steppedInto: You took a new step in the {{label}} area
feedback.boldAdventure: That was a bold taste adventure!
feedback.aLittleOff: A bit different, but not too far off

badges.streak7Desc: Opened recommendations 7 days in a row

rouletteCard.nextSurpriseTomorrow: Your next surprise arrives tomorrow at 8 AM

shareCard.distanceMessage: Someone recommended a song {{percent}}% away from my taste
shareCard.tagline: Step outside your taste comfort zone

common.failedOnboarding: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.
common.failedSubmitFeedback: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.

login.title: Taste Roulette
login.subtitle: Discover music outside your comfort zone
login.confirmationSent: We sent you a confirmation link. Check spam folder too.
login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
login.appDescription: Every day, receive a music recommendation from a stranger — designed to surprise you, not match you.
login.enterEmailFirst: Please enter your email address first.
